UseInAppCamera.description: Android only. This flag is to determine whether to use in-app camera for AttachmentFormCell control's 'Take Photo' option. If set to true, in-app camera would be used instead of device default camera. On some Android devices with limited RAM, the MDK app may close unexpectedly after launching the camera via the AttachmentFormCell. This behavior is typically caused by memory pressure when switching to an external camera application. To mitigate this issue, the in-app camera option was introduced: it consumes less memory, opens within the MDK app, avoiding context switching to a separate camera app, and helps improve app stability on lower-end devices.
